title: BootProofReceipt
description: Proof receipt emitted after every sovereign boot. sovereign=true only when boot_mode=FULL and all phases pass. Appended to Alexandria ledger.

all_phases_hash.description: SHA256 of the serialized phases array — canonical tamper-evident fingerprint

schema_fingerprints.description: Live freeze_manifest() snapshot at receipt emission time

sovereign.description: true only if boot_mode=FULL and every phase.status=pass
